title: linociera leprocarpa var. courtallensis
intro: Linociera leprocarpa var. courtallensis, also known as the Western Ghats linociera, is a plant species native to the Western Ghats region of India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Linociera leprocarpa var. courtallensis include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve immune function, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its herbal preparations are used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
